page_metadata.biotools__summary: MAVisto (Motif Analysis and VISualisation TOolkit)is a tool for the exploration of motifs in network. It provides a flexible motif search algorithm and different views for the analysis and visualisation of network motifs.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: MAVisto (Motif Analysis and VISualisation TOolkit)is a tool for the exploration of motifs in network. It provides a flexible motif search algorithm and different views for the analysis and visualisation of network motifs.
